testcase.name: test_test_gate_results_structure

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'tests' in {'passed': 11, 'results': [{'actual': True, 'expected': False, 'id': 1, 'name': 'Calendar invite (filter)', ...}, {'actual': False, 'expected': False, 'id': 2, 'name': 'Meeting cancellation (filter)', ...}, {'actual': False, 'expected': False, 'id': 3, 'name': 'Internal check-in (filter)', ...}, {'actual': True, 'expected': True, 'id': 4, 'name': 'Warm intro to founder (pass)', ...}, {'actual': True, 'expected': True, 'id': 5, 'name': 'Founder pitch (pass)', ...}, {'actual': True, 'expected': True, 'id': 6, 'name': 'LP investor relations (pass)', ...}, ...], 'total': 12}
